message:
feat(daemon): integrate HTTP server startup/shutdown

Add httpServer field to Daemon struct and implement conditional
startup in Start() when HTTP is enabled. Gracefully shutdown HTTP
server with 5-second timeout in Stop() before gRPC shutdown.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,18 @@
+package daemon
+
+import (
+	"testing"
+
+	"github.com/obra/stockyard/pkg/config"
+)
+
+func TestDaemon_HTTPServerDisabled(t *testing.T) {
+	cfg := config.DefaultConfig()
+	cfg.HTTP.Enabled = false
+
+	d := &Daemon{cfg: cfg}
+
+	if d.httpServer != nil {
+		t.Error("expected no HTTP server when disabled")
+	}
+}
